decisions.rationale: Loans, Payouts, Share Withdrawals, Petty Cash, Bank Withdrawals, and Cash Disbursements all need the control for comprehensive fraud prevention.
Creator cannot approve, but the approver CAN disburse. Simpler, sufficient for most SACCOs. Avoids requiring 3+ privileged users for every transaction.

decisions.decision: ADMIN can self-approve with mandatory reason
decisions.rationale: Small SACCOs may only have one admin available. Override requires ADMIN role + documented reason, logged in audit trail for accountability.

decisions.decision: Add approval step to Bank Withdrawals and Cash Disbursements
decisions.rationale: Both currently lack formal approval workflows. Bank Withdrawals need PENDING->APPROVED->COMPLETED. Cash Disbursements need a new status workflow with approval before recording.
Centralized, DRY utility that all services call. Easy to test, single place to maintain the logic. Located at sacco-common/.../guard/MakerCheckerGuard.java.

decisions.decision: Optional overrideReason field on approve request DTOs
decisions.rationale: Clean API design — field is optional normally, required only when self-approving. No extra endpoints needed. Validated server-side by MakerCheckerGuard.

constraints: Must not break existing approval workflows — additive changes only
createdBy field must be reliably set on all entities (fix LoanApplication bug where it's not set)
ADMIN override must always produce an audit event with the override reason
Bank Withdrawal and Cash Disbursement need new Liquibase migrations for status columns
All maker-checker violations return HTTP 403 with clear error message
Frontend must show override reason input when self-approving (ADMIN only)
Existing transition guards (LoanTransitionGuards, PayoutTransitionGuards) must be updated for new status flows
openQuestions: Should the override audit event be a new AuditAction (e.g., OVERRIDE_APPROVE) or reuse APPROVE with metadata?
Should the frontend proactively warn ADMINs when they're about to self-approve, or only show the reason field after submission fails?
For Cash Disbursements: should the new workflow be PENDING->APPROVED->RECORDED, or add status to the existing single-step creation?
